Activity: Oxidize, Pyrometallurgy

CreatorTriebe, Weaver

Description

Notes:
Can be completed on leached (from A3324) or further refined (via hydrometallurgy, A333) produced materials.

Definitions:
Oxidize:

Standards:
None

References:
None

Usage List:

  • Appears as Oxidize, Pyrometallurgy in Diagram Pyrometallurgy in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
